race.description: O'donnells Transport Lakes Entrance Cup 20th Sept Hcp (Bm56)
race.comment: THE GOV (3) is flying of late, winning three in a row earlier in the campaign and following it up with two runner up efforts. She was beaten under a length last time at Cranbourne and this looks very winnable from a good draw. PANTOJA (4) was responsible for a solid effort last time out when second at Ballarat Synthetic over 1000m, beaten a head. He won't need to improve much here to break through. RUBY AVENUE (2) did very well to fill a minor placing when resuming at Pakenham Synthetic but struggled there last time with a big weight. 4kg claimer on here and a quick backup is interesting, he can improve. BRUTAL WORLD (11) resumes. Her form last time in reads well for this and she did win her only race to date here. Keep safe.
